title: GATE-01 closure - Artifact-Store Transaction / Rollback
change_summary: GATE-01 declared CLOSED. CIC-TEST-REPORT-GATE-01-R2 passed 15/15 (7/7 spec plus 8/8 additional). True mid-lineage-write fault injection exercised under ROLLBACK semantics per AMD-v2.4.0-0001. Hash chain valid. Supersedes CIC-TEST-REPORT-GATE-01 (6/7, FAIL).
decision_note: Tier 1 approved execution on 2026-07-14. Closure applies only to GATE-01; no activation authority granted.
